evals.prompt: 我卖阻力带和弹力带，客单价 80～200，主要在独立站 + Shopify，用 Klaviyo。想用「训练计划」做购后和复购：买完送入门计划，过几周再推进阶计划促复购。给我一套可落地的流设计，包括触发、时间线、每条流里计划叫啥、邮件结构，以及和 Klaviyo 的对应关系。
evals.expected_output: Output includes: flow map listing all flows (post-purchase plan delivery, advancement plan for repurchase), per-flow specs with trigger, exit rules, timeline (T+), plan type and name, message subject/body structure/CTA, KPIs, and Klaviyo implementation mapping. Plan content list tying plans to products.

assertions.name: has_flow_map
assertions.description: 输出包含「训练计划配套流总览」或 Flow map 小节，列出流名称与目标

assertions.name: has_post_purchase_and_repurchase_flows
assertions.description: 至少包含购后入门计划交付流与进阶/复购流两条流规格

assertions.name: each_flow_has_required_fields
assertions.description: 每条流规格包含 Goal、Trigger、Exit rules、Timeline、计划类型、Messages 结构、KPIs

assertions.name: has_plan_content_list
assertions.description: 输出包含「计划内容清单」且至少列出 1 个计划及其适用产品/时长

assertions.name: has_klaviyo_mapping
assertions.description: 实现映射中明确提到 Klaviyo 或对应 Klaviyo 的搭建方式

evals.prompt: 我们做瑜伽环和泡沫轴，复购率不高，想用「21 天挑战」拉新 + 首单后送 7 天入门计划提升留存。需要：拉新用的挑战流（留资或首单解锁）、购后 7 天计划交付流、以及简单分层（新客/已购未复购）。邮件为主，短信只用在关键节点。
evals.expected_output: Output includes: flow map with challenge (acquisition) flow and post-purchase 7-day plan delivery flow; segment logic (new vs post-first-purchase); trigger/exit/timeline/message structure for each; note on SMS only for key moments; plan content list (21-day challenge, 7-day beginner) and product fit.

assertions.name: has_challenge_flow
assertions.description: 包含以 21 天挑战/留资或首单解锁为目标的拉新流规格

assertions.name: has_7day_post_purchase_flow
assertions.description: 包含购后 7 天入门计划交付流，且计划类型为 7 天/入门

assertions.name: has_segment_logic
assertions.description: 明确分群逻辑：新客与已购未复购（或类似表述）

assertions.name: sms_only_key_moments
assertions.description: 对短信使用有限制说明（仅关键节点等）

assertions.name: plan_list_fits_products
assertions.description: 计划内容清单中至少包含 21 天挑战与 7 天入门计划，并对应瑜伽环/泡沫轴

evals.prompt: 健身配件店，有阻力带套装和单条卖。想对 60 天没买的人用「新计划」唤醒，不要一上来就大促。给一条沉默唤醒流：触发条件、时间线、邮件主题和正文框架、计划类型建议，以及 exit 规则。
evals.expected_output: Output includes: one flow spec for win-back (60-day no purchase); trigger and exit rules; timeline (e.g. T+0 email with new plan); subject/hook and body structure emphasizing 'new plan' not heavy discount; suggested plan type (e.g. new weekly plan or short challenge); KPI and implementation note.

assertions.name: win_back_trigger
assertions.description: 流规格的 Trigger 为 60 天未购或类似沉默定义

assertions.name: message_emphasizes_plan_not_discount
assertions.description: 邮件主题或正文框架以「新计划」为主、非强打折

assertions.name: has_plan_type_suggestion
assertions.description: 给出计划类型建议（如周计划、短挑战等）

assertions.name: has_timeline_and_kpi
assertions.description: 包含时间线（如 T+0）与 KPI 或实现说明
